summary: Completed visual rhythm testing for service landing pages (Palvelut). All visual improvements verified: alternating section backgrounds (white/grey/themed), premium feature cards, larger description image (420px), redesigned service areas section with badges and CTAs, and standardized 80px section spacing.
passed_tests: Service page /tasoitustyot-helsinki loads correctly with H1 'Tasoitustyöt Helsingissä'
Service page /maalaustyot-helsinki loads correctly with H1 'Maalaustyöt Helsingissä'
Description section has WHITE background (rgb(255, 255, 255), service-section-white)
Features section has LIGHT GREY background (rgb(247, 250, 251) = #f7fafb, service-section-grey)
Why Choose section has WHITE background (service-section-white)
Process section has LIGHT GREY background (service-section-grey)
Service Areas section has THEMED/PRIMARY COLOR background (service-area-themed)
Theme color from settings (#0891B2) is applied to service areas section via CSS variable
Service area badges displayed as inline pills (border-radius: 9999px) with white text
Service area badges include location (MapPin) icons
5 service area badges present: Helsinki, Espoo, Vantaa, Kauniainen, Uusimaa
Two CTA buttons in service areas section: 'Pyydä ilmainen arvio' and 'Soita nyt'
Feature cards have improved styling: padding 28px, border-radius 12px
Feature cards have proper hover effect with box-shadow rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08) 0px 12px 30px
icon-bg-primary elements styled correctly (48px x 48px, border-radius 10px)
Process step numbers have proper styling: 56px x 56px, border-radius 14px
Process step numbers have shadow: rgba(0, 86, 210, 0.25) 0px 4px 14px
Service description image is larger (420px height on desktop)
Why-choose-item elements have proper styling: padding 14px 16px, border-radius 10px
benefits-box-premium has border-radius 20px, padding 32px, shadow rgba(0, 86, 210, 0.08)
All sections have standardized 80px padding (5rem on desktop)
API /api/service-pages/tasoitustyot-helsinki returns page data correctly
API /api/settings returns theme_color applied to service areas
Visual rhythm verified: Description(white) → Features(grey) → WhyChoose(white) → Process(grey) → ServiceAreas(themed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Visual rhythm improvements complete for service pages. Section backgrounds alternate: white → grey (#f7fafb) → white → grey → themed (primary color). Service Areas section redesigned with centered layout, area badges as pills with MapPin icons, and two CTA buttons. Feature cards have 28px padding, 12px border-radius, and hover lift effect. Process steps have shadow styling. All sections use 80px (5rem) padding. Theme color from settings dynamically applied via CSS variable.
